overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban plaza with reflective water features, ascending stairs past large digital billboards advertising travel to Night City, and navigating city streets with elevated highways and moderate vehicle traffic. The environment features modern glass and concrete architecture, palm trees, and holographic displays under a partly cloudy midday sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern plaza with reflective water feature and holographic displays

events.description: character begins ascending wide concrete stairs toward upper level

agents.ego_description: character walking through modern plaza with reflective pools and approaching wide concrete stairs

entered.detail: futuristic geometric building with clean white concrete surfaces and embedded lighting
shallow water feature reflecting surrounding architecture and sky
broad staircase leading to upper plaza level
glowing blue digital interfaces mounted on building walls

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic urban plaza featuring modern concrete architecture and a reflective water pool. The character walks forward through the plaza, passing NPCs standing near the building walls, and begins ascending a wide staircase toward an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper pedestrian plaza with large digital billboards and palm trees

events.description: character reaches top of stairs entering open plaza with large advertising billboards
character turns left and continues walking past palm trees toward street

agents.ego_description: character walking through upper plaza past large digital billboards and palm trees, turning left toward the street

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting on yellow bench wearing red top and white pants

entered.detail: massive advertisement displaying 'Travel from Chicago to Night City' with seated businessman image
red advertisement with white text reading 'ZEIG DICH'
tropical palm trees lining the plaza providing greenery
modern yellow seating along the plaza walls

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a sunlit upper plaza dominated by massive digital billboards advertising travel to Night City. Palm trees and modern benches line the space where a few NPCs relax. The character turns left and continues walking toward the street level, passing the billboards which remain visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with elevated highway overpass and vehicle traffic

events.description: character descends to street level with visible vehicle traffic and elevated highway structure
purple sports car and white van pass by on the multi-lane road
yellow sports car turns at intersection and drives past the character

agents.ego_description: character walking along city sidewalk observing traffic and other pedestrians, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: purple sports car driving down the street away from the camera
yellow sports car turning at the intersection and accelerating past

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel elevated highway with multiple levels casting shadows below
modern skyscrapers with reflective glass facades lining the street
suspended traffic signals showing red lights for vehicles
palm trees planted along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character reaches street level and walks along a busy urban sidewalk beneath an imposing elevated highway structure. Various vehicles including a purple sports car and later a yellow sports car pass by on the multi-lane road. Modern glass office towers rise on either side while palm trees line the pedestrian walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with benches and vertical advertising banners

events.description: character crosses the street at crosswalk and enters covered plaza area
lighting shifts to dappled shade under the elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: character crossing the street at a crosswalk and entering a covered pedestrian plaza with modern landscaping

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street together in the same direction

entered.detail: overhead structure formed by the elevated highway providing partial cover
tall colorful vertical banners with anime-style characters and advertisements
sleek black and yellow benches arranged in the plaza seating area
rectangular planters containing manicured green hedges and small trees

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at a marked crosswalk, joining other pedestrians, and enters a modern covered plaza situated beneath the elevated highway. The space features vertical advertising banners, contemporary benches, and landscaped planter boxes with hedges. The lighting shifts to a pleasant dappled shade as the character walks deeper into the plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene urban plaza through a series of ascending levels and into a bustling city street. It begins in a modern concrete plaza with a reflective water pool, moving forward as the character ascends a wide staircase toward an upper terrace. As the character emerges into the sunlight, the scene opens into a bright upper plaza dominated by massive digital billboards and palm trees before turning left toward the street level. The camera then descends to a busy sidewalk beneath an imposing elevated highway, where colorful sports cars pass by glass office towers. Finally, the character crosses a marked crosswalk and enters a covered plaza, where the lighting shifts to a dappled shade amidst vertical advertising banners and landscaped hedges.
